title: Viking CCS pipeline project: development consent order, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Chrysaor Production (UK) Limited for:   the construction, operation and maintenance of a carbon dioxide (CO2) intake facility at Immingham the construction and burial of an onshore CO2 transportation pipeline to Theddlethorpe on the Lincolnshire coast the construction of a facility at Theddlethorpe to send the CO2 out to a subsea reservoir   Date of decision  9 April 2025  Company / location   Chrysaor Production (UK) Limited151 Buckingham Palace Road LondonSW1W 9SZ   Maximum storage  The pipeline aims to transport and store up to 10 million tonnes of CO2 annually by 2030.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
